message: The engine's Codex hook registration (.codex/hooks.json) does not match the registration format — an event name outside the platform's documented set, or a hook entry missing its command (the exact problem is named just above). A malformed registration means Codex silently runs none of the engine's session hooks. The file is maintained by the engine's module wiring: repair it by re-applying the wiring (or revert the hand-edit) rather than editing entries in place.
